diagrams.title: Permutation vs Combination
diagrams.content:
PERMUTATION (Order matters)     COMBINATION (Order doesn't)
────────────────────────────    ────────────────────────────
Arrange ABC:                    Choose 2 from ABC:
ABC, ACB, BAC, BCA, CAB, CBA    {A,B}, {A,C}, {B,C}
= 6 ways = 3!                   = 3 ways = C(3,2)

Formula: P(n,r) = n!/(n-r)!     Formula: C(n,r) = n!/(r!(n-r)!)

Relation: P(n,r) = C(n,r) × r!

visuals.title: Permutations Combinations
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Permutations and Combinations</text>
  
  <!-- Permutations Section -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Permutations
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="50" y="110" width="50" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="75" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="110" y="110" width="50" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="135" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="170" y="110" width="50" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="195" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <path d="M80 140 Q105 160 130 140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Order Matters
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="250" y="110" width="120" height="80" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    ABC
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    ACB
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    BAC
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Combinations Section -->
  <rect x="50" y="210" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="235" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Combinations
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="50" y="260" width="50" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="75" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="110" y="260" width="50" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="135" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="170" y="260" width="50" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="195" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <path d="M80 290 Q105 310 130 290" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <rect x="250" y="210" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="235" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Order Doesn't Matter
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="250" y="260" width="120" height="50" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    AB, AC, BC
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Formula Labels -->
  <text x="110" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    nPr = n!/(n-r)!
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="110" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    nCr = n!/r!(n-r)!
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
